author: chayanit
body:
This is PR to add new upgrade workflows as requested by HLT (STEAM) https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/PDMVRELVALS-115. All GEN fragments have been reviewing in #33409 , #33414 , #33433 and #33386. They need for Run3 validation campaign in master release. 

No need to backport
title: Add new workflows to upgradeWorkflowComponents.py for HLT
